headline: Jamf acquires Identity Automation for $200M
summary: Jamf announced the acquisition of Identity Automation, deepening its identity + device-trust posture for Apple-centric education and healthcare deals. Closes the gap with Microsoft Intune + Entra ID conditional access.

gap_analysis.soti_today: Limited native conditional-access posture; relies on Entra integration for joint Microsoft deals.
gap_analysis.roadmap: [STUB] Jira/Productboard not connected. Replace with PRD/epic when wired.
gap_analysis.others: Intune deeply integrated with Entra; Omnissa via Workspace ONE Access; Ivanti via Neurons.

headline: Microsoft Intune adjusts E5 add-on pricing for SMB tier
summary: Microsoft published a modest E5 add-on price adjustment for sub-300-seat tenants. Net effect: ~6% lower TCO for SMB Intune deals; less material at enterprise.

gap_analysis.soti_today: SOTI list pricing competitive at SMB but lacks bundled-E5 narrative.
gap_analysis.roadmap: [STUB] Jira/Productboard not connected. Replace with PRD/epic when wired.
gap_analysis.others: Jamf bundles with Apple Education; Hexnode SMB-focused; Scalefusion competitive at low end.

headline: Omnissa names new Chief Product Officer
summary: Omnissa announced a new CPO with prior experience at Workday and Okta. Signals continued enterprise positioning post-Broadcom split. No immediate product shifts.

gap_analysis.roadmap: [STUB] Jira/Productboard not connected. Replace with PRD/epic when wired.
gap_analysis.others: Track for future roadmap direction signals.

headline: Scalefusion teases AI-assisted policy authoring
summary: Scalefusion blog post previews an AI assistant for MDM policy authoring. Aimed at MSP segment. No release date.
